SensorInfo extract_sensor_info(const std::span<const uint8_t> buffer) {
    // Create a binary_stream from the buffer
    hexi::binary_stream stream(buffer.data(), buffer.size());

    // Use view to extract the sensor name (null-terminated)
    std::string_view sensor_name = stream.view();

    // Check if there's enough data to read the sensor_id
    stream.enforce_read_bounds(sizeof(uint32_t));

    stream.read(&sensor_id);

    // Skip the remaining data
    stream.skip(stream.size() - sizeof(uint32_t)); // But we have already read the sensor_id, so we skip the rest

    return {sensor_id, sensor_name};
}
